title: Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|old|imp|reb|new|italics=1}} {{Youmay|the real-world book|[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force|the in-universe book]]}} {{Otheruses|Jedi vs. Sith}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:EssentialGuidetotheForce.jpg]] |title=''Jedi vs. Sith:
The Essential Guide to the Force'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist=*[[Bradford Foltz]] {{C|Cover design}} *[[Tommy Lee Edwards]] {{C|Cover illustration}} |illustrator=*Tommy Lee Edwards *[[Chris Trevas]] |editor= |publisher=[[Del Rey]] |release date=*[[November 27]], [[2007]] {{C|Paperback}}{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/192144/jedi-vs-sith-star-wars-the-essential-guide-to-the-force-by-ryder-windham/9780345493347|text=Jedi vs. Sith: Star Wars: The Essential Guide to the Force}} {{C|Paperback}} *[[April 30]], [[2013]] {{C|eBook}}{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/192144/jedi-vs-sith-star-wars-the-essential-guide-to-the-force-by-ryder-windham/9780345542779|text=Jedi vs. Sith: Star Wars: The Essential Guide to the Force}} {{C|eBook}} |type=*Paperback *eBook |pages=256 |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=9780345493347 |series=''[[Star Wars: Essential Guides]]'' |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force''''' is an entry in the [[Star Wars: Essential Guides|''Essential Guide'']] series of books, covering aspects of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. It is written by [[Ryder Windham]] and was released on [[November 27]], [[2007]]. It was the first Essential Guide to contain original material (as opposed to a revised and updated version of a previous book) since the [[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|original Alien Species guide]] in [[2001]]. As with both Alien Species guides, ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' and the [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']], this book "exists" also as an [[in-universe]] publication, written by [[Tionne Solusar]]. ==Publisher's summary== '''''The Ultimate Guide to the Absolute Power at the Heart of the ''[[The galaxy/Legends|Star Wars'' Galaxy]]''''' ''[[The Force/Legends|The Force]], in the immortal words of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], "surrounds us, it penetrates us, it binds the galaxy together." The fortunate few who are able to tap into this extraordinary power have studied and cultivated the full spectrum of its potential - either embracing its virtuous qualities or succumbing to its evil temptations. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] seek to bring peace and englightenment to the galaxy, while the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] hunger only for conquest and control.'' ''This comprehensive one-of-a-kind overview chronicles the known history of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and its wielders down through the ages, from the founding tenets of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] teachings to the landmark events and legendary figures that have shaped the struggle between the light and dark sides. In firsthand accounts by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and a host of other [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]], [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]], scholars and sages, ''Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'' spans the breadth of available knowledge, including'' *''The first recorded discovery of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]'' *''Significant battles affected by the Force throughout galactic history'' *''The purpose, construction, and importance of [[Holocron/Legends|Holocrons]]'' *''The evolution of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] orders'' *''[[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force sensitive]]'' abilities - including [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]], [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]] and "[[Mind trick/Legends|mind tricks]]"'' *''A vivid portrayal of the [[Chosen One/Legends|Chosen One]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]'' ''PLUS - More than one hundred brand-new full color illustrations!'' ''No ''[[Star Wars]]'' library is complete without this definitive guide to understanding the Force. Remember: [[The Force/Legends|The Force]] will be with you…always.'' ==Contents== *Author Acknowledgements *Introduction *Time Line [[File:TionneSolusar-EGTF.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Tionne Solusar, an in-universe author]] '''Part One: History and [[Holocron/Legends|Holocrons]]''' '''The Holocrons''' *The [[Tedryn Holocron]] *The [[Asli Krimsan's holocron|Asli Krimsan Holocron]] *The [[Great Holocron/Legends|Great Holocron]] *The [[Telos Holocron]] and [[Holocron of Heresies|Darth Andeddu's Holocron]] '''Significant Battles''' *[[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]] *''[[Jensaarai/Legends|Jensaarai]]'' *[[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] *[[Aing-Tii/Legends|Aing-Tii]] *[[Matukai/Legends|Matukai]] *[[Witches of Dathomir|Force Witches]] *The [[Reborn]] *[[Disciples of Ragnos]] *[[Shadow Academy]] *[[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] '''Part Six: [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|The Chosen One]]''' *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends#Early life .2842 BBY.E2.80.9332 BBY.29|Tatooine Childhood]] *Podracer Champion *Arrival at the Jedi Temple *Jedi Training *First Mission *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends#Return to Tatooine|Return to Tatooine]] *[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Forbidden Love]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends#Transformation to Vader .2819 BBY.29|Darth Vader]] '''[[Legacy era|Afterword]]''' '''Index''' '''About the Author''' '''About the Illustrators''' ==Continuity== Under the section entitled ''The Reformation of Revan'', an article written in-universe by [[Deesra Luur Jada]], the following statement is made: "''Increasingly, I feel like nothing more than a necrologist, dispatching weekly obituaries to the archives on Ossus.''" However, the guide does not mention that the [[Great Jedi Library/Legends|Great Jedi Library]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] was thought to have been destroyed during the Sith War. The book states incorrectly the dates for the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]]. The book incorrectly states that Quinlan Vos retrieved Darth Andeddu's Holocron in 23 BBY. The correct date is 21 BBY. The book takes place almost immediately after the funeral of [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], after she is killed by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]. The last entry made in the book, by a Jedi apprentice, incorrectly states that Darth Nihl and Darth Talon are Darth Krayt's hands. Talon becomes a Hand in 137 ABY, though the entry was allegedly written in 130 ABY. [[Vandar Tokare]] is misspelled as "Vandar Dokar". The book incorrectly treats [[Thurra system/Legends|Thule]] and [[Thurra system/Legends|Thurra systems]] as separate locations and later incorrectly states that [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]] is located in the Thurra system. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9780345493347}}; [[November
